channel.title: RetroMac
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.7.2
item.description:
RetroMac 1.7.2

  • Clock widget: a themed analog clock (BeOS, Mac OS 9, Windows XP, Maiks Favourite) — open it from the deskbar/taskbar clock or a desktop icon.
  • Maiks Favourite: pixel-art macOS window chrome for the CPU widget, App Folder, Music (TV streams) folder and the Downloads dock fan.
  • Menu polish: themes and shaders sorted alphabetically; a crown marks the special themes; the permission-free “Lite” shaders sit right under Free.
  • Stronger LCD Lite shader, clean start (nothing auto-activated), and numerous fixes.

item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
RetroMac 1.7 — The big themes overhaul

  • Themes Overhaul — BeOS, Windows XP & Mac OS 9: a massive rework, as close to the originals as possible — including a native CPU widget and authentically styled windows in each theme.
  • New theme “Maiks Favourite”: an animated Pac-Man dock and live previews of your running apps.
  • Webcam support stabilized: more reliable virtual-camera toggling and retro effects.
  • Stability & fixes: numerous bug fixes and general stability improvements.

item.title: Version 1.3
item.description:
RetroMac 1.3

  • Dock auto-hide: reclaim screen space on 1080p monitors — dock slides in on mouse proximity
  • Freedoom: free Doom experience with native CRT shader (auto-download)
  • Quake 1 & 2 via RetroArch with CRT shader and WASD controls
  • Native PK3 shaders for Duke Nukem 3D and Shadow Warrior (zero input lag)
  • Removed all overlay-based game shaders — native engine shaders only

item.title: Version 1.1
item.description:
RetroMac 1.1

  • Automatic updates via Sparkle
  • Fixed theme switching crash (BeOS to Snow Leopard)
  • Dynamic trash icon (empty/full state)
  • Improved Screen Recording permission onboarding
  • User-friendly error messages for missing permissions
